title: Domicile of districts
doc_html:
§578.  Domicile of districts

The domicile of each district is the parish seat of the parish in which it is created.  The domicile of any district composed of territory partly within two or more parishes is the parish seat of the parish furnishing the most territory.
doc_text:
§578.  Domicile of districts
The domicile of each district is the parish seat of the parish in which it is created.  The domicile of any district composed of territory partly within two or more parishes is the parish seat of the parish furnishing the most territory.
